description_long: This object is a vertical pennant flag with a rectangular lower section and a rounded upper edge, mounted on a slender black pole. The flag itself is a light blue color with a white logo or text printed vertically near the top, partially visible in the images. The pole appears to be made of metal or a sturdy composite, providing support for the lightweight fabric flag. The flag's material is likely a synthetic fabric such as polyester, designed to withstand outdoor conditions. The overall construction is minimal, with the flag attached to the pole along one edge, allowing it to flutter in the wind. The design is typical for promotional or informational use in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or event spaces.
description: A light blue vertical pennant flag with a rounded top edge, mounted on a slim black pole and featuring a white logo or text. The flag is made of fabric and designed for outdoor urban display.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full blue flag with white logo/text and the black supporting pole.
description_view_1: Edge-on view showing only the thin profile of the flag and pole, making the flag nearly invisible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the blue flag and black pole from the other side.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side of view 1, again showing only the thin profile of the flag and pole.
attribute_graphic_design: The pennant features a solid light blue background with a white logo or text printed vertically near the top. The design is simple and modern, suitable for branding or informational purposes.
